economic_notes: Investments in government business enterprises including Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society (property rental/management), Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd. (environmental monitoring), Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Management Ltd., and Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe Limited Partnership (forestry/heritage protection). Ownership interests in Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP and Centre Creek LP were transferred to Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe LP during the year. First Nations Fiscal Management Act property taxation regime in place.
notes: 4 GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society, Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd., Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Management Ltd., and Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe Limited Partnership. Ownership interests in Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP and Centre Creek LP transferred to Ts'elxweyeqx Tribe LP during the year. Term deposit of approximately $50,000 (net) held with RBC at 4.75%. Settlement trust funds from 2015 Federal Government land claim settlement exist but amounts not consolidated. CMHC subsidy ($44,206) included in total_government_transfers along with ISC funding. Tzeachten First Nation transfers ($384,940) classified as OSR as intergovernmental transfer from another First Nation. No remuneration schedule included in the provided statements. Trust funds held by federal government: $83 (capital fund). Cash balance of $10,002,487 includes proceeds from $4,950,000 term deposit maturity.
